subject: [PATCH 2/4] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's impact on performance and suggested adding a comment to explain the change. Also asked if the patch is intended to be backported to older kernels.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Approved the patch and suggested adding a Reviewed-by tag. Also mentioned that the change is not backportable to older kernels.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: The patch bypasses the mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead by moving the targeted readahead block above the mmap_miss check in do_sync_mmap_readahead(). This change allows arch-preferred folio orders to be requested for executable memory, which can improve performance. The patch also sets async_size to 0 for exec mappings to prevent speculative prefetch.
